title: ononis repens var. miniana
intro: Ononis repens var. miniana, also known as the small-leaf restharrow, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Ononis repens var. miniana include its potential to support the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
